zh.lifeSummary: 當Wischard Ledet於大約1210年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾布雷布盧可時，他的父親Henry de Braybrooke32歲，母親Christiana Ledet13歲。他於大約1230年與Mary de Braybrook在英國諾薩普頓史爾可比結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1241年9月享年32歲。

nameMeanings.name: Ledet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Cecile, Emile, Leonce, Angelle, Antoine, Aurelie, Camille, Etienne, Ferrel, Gillis, Gisele.

French: variant of Ledé, from le dé, meaning either ‘the thimble’ or ‘the die’, hence used as a metonymic occupational name for a stitcher or tailor, or as a nickname for a gambler. Compare Leday 1 and Ledee 2.

History: Antoine Livaudais Ledet from La Rochelle in Charente-Maritime, France, married first Marguerite Willig in Edgard, LA, in 1788, and second Victoire-Françoise Quimine in Plattenville, LA, in 1797.

variants.name: Ledee
meanings: French (Ledée and Lédée): variant of Ledé (see Ledet ). This surname is also found in the West Indies, including Puerto Rico.

variants.name: Leday
meanings: Americanized form of French   Ledet  . This surname is found mainly in LA and TX, and is borne mainly by African Americans. Compare   Lada   5.
In some cases possibly also French: variant, with fused masculine definite article le, of Day , a habitatonal name from Day in the Ardennes.

nameMeanings.name: Wischard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: variant of   Wishart  . This surname is very rare in Britain.

variants.name: Wishart
meanings: The same with the old name Guiscard, in Hebrew R. Wiscard; from Old German wtsa-hart, strong leader. It is found Latinised Guiscardus.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Wischard Ledet was born about 1210, in Braybrooke, Northamptonshire, England, his father, Henry de Braybrooke, was 32 and his mother, Christiana Ledet, was 13. He married Mary de Braybrook about 1230, in Corby, Northamptonshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in September 1241, at the age of 32.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Wischard Ledet est né environ 1210, à Braybrooke, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, Henry de Braybrooke, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Christiana Ledet, avait 13 ans. Il a épousé Mary de Braybrook environ 1230, à Corby, Northamptonshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en septembre 1241, à l’âge de 32 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Wischard Ledet um 1210 in Braybrooke, Northamptonshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry de Braybrooke 32 und seine Mutter Christiana Ledet 13. Er hat um 1230 in Corby, Northamptonshire, England Mary de Braybrook geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb im September 1241 im Alter von 32 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Wischard Ledet è nato il circa 1210 nel Braybrooke, Northamptonshire, England, il suo padre, Henry de Braybrooke, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Christiana Ledet, aveva 13 anni. Lui sposato Mary de Braybrook circa 1230, nel Corby, Northamptonshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel settembre 1241, all'età di 32 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Wischard Ledetが約1210年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアブレイブルークで生まれた時，父Henry de Braybrookeは32歳，母Christiana Ledetは13歳であった。約1230年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアコルビーでMary de Braybrookと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1241年9月に32歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Wischard Ledet(이)가 대략 1210년 영국 노르섬프토실르 브라이브룩에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry de Braybrooke(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Christiana Ledet(은)는 13세였다. 그는 대략 1230년 영국 노르섬프토실르 코르비에서 Mary de Braybrook(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1241년 9월 32세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Wischard Ledet nasceu aproximadamente 1210, em Braybrooke, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry de Braybrooke, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Christiana Ledet, tinha 13 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary de Braybrook aproximadamente 1230, em Corby, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em setembro de 1241, com 32 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Wischard Ledet родился около 1210 г. в местности брэибрук, нортамптоншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Henry de Braybrooke было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Christiana Ledet, 13. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary de Braybrook около 1230 г. в местности корби, нортамптоншир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер сентябрь 1241 г. в возрасте 32 лет.
